name: GKE cluster master authorized networks not enabled
description: Master Authorized Networks is not enabled on this GKE cluster. Without it, the Kubernetes API server is accessible from any IP address (subject only to authentication), increasing the attack surface.
remediation: Enable Master Authorized Networks and configure CIDR blocks for your corporate networks, VPN endpoints, and CI/CD pipeline IP ranges. Do not include 0.0.0.0/0.
